name: Fragrant Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole Japanese eggplant, sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté Bengali 5-spice in oil until fragrant and popping.
2. Add turmeric and chili flakes; cook for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in onion and garlic; cook until softened.
4. Add cabbage and zucchini; cook until vegetables are tender.
5. Incorporate eggplant and chickpeas with the reserved liquid from the chickpeas.
6. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in tomato sauce and tomato paste. Cover and simmer for 40 minutes.
8. Serve with basmati rice.
Per serving: 262 calories, 12g protein, 186mg sodium, 41g carbohydrates, 7g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 69mg calcium.
